title: Homotopy $4$-spheres associated to an infinite order loose cork
journal: Journal of Gokova Geometry Topology volume 14 (2020)
journal_ref: Journal of Gokova Geometry Topology volume 14 (2020)
abstract: We show the homotopy spheres $Σ_{n} = -W\smile_{f^{n}}W$, formed by doubling the infinite order loose-cork $(W,f)$ by iterates of the cork diffeomorphism $f: \partial W \to \partial W$ is $S^4$. To do this we first show that $Σ_{n} $ are obtained by Gluck twistings of $S^4$; then from this we show how to cancel $3$-handles of $Σ_{n}$ and identify it by $S^{4}$.
